import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import'./SalesSummary.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const SalesSummary=()=>{const[invoices,setInvoices]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchInvoices=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/invoices');if(!response.ok){throw new Error("HTTP error! status: ".concat(response.status));}const data=await response.json();setInvoices(data);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching invoices:',error);}};fetchInvoices();},[]);const sendReminder=invoice=>{const message="Dear ".concat(invoice.customer_name,",

};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"sales-summary-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Sales Summary"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"sales-summary-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Transaction ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Customer Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Total Amount"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Status"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Action"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:invoices.map(invoice=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:invoice.id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:invoice.customer_name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:invoice.total_amount}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:invoice.status}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>sendReminder(invoice),children:"Send Reminder"})})]},invoice.id))})]})]});};export default SalesSummary;
